ModMetaData.name: Zed Zed Zed
ModMetaData.author: OpenAI for Johnny Berry
ModMetaData.description:
Zed Zed Zed is a configurable zombie horde mod with changeable zombie naming, tainted apparel, bite and scratch melee attacks, edge trickle spawning, top-corner zombie count UI, ground-burst infestations, full moon horde events, rare blood moons, dirty humanlike visuals, handcrafted variant-specific RimWorld-style overlays, weakened limbs, rare fast zombies, and reanimation unless the head is damaged.
Includes source files and a GitHub Actions workflow for building an installable package.
